code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut token = ""
mut first = true
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if string.len(token) > 0
      if first
        result = "#{token} #{token}"
        first = false
      else
        result = "#{result} #{token} #{token}"
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if string.len(token) > 0
  if first
    result = "#{token} #{token}"
  else
    result = "#{result} #{token} #{token}"
  end
end

println(result)
